overall.description: First-person exploration of a luxurious futuristic apartment from Cyberpunk 2077, beginning in a warmly lit marble bathroom and transitioning through neon-accented living spaces to a private office. The footage showcases high-end interior design with glass, marble, and wood materials.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury bathroom with glass shower enclosure

agents.ego_description: slowly panning around the bathroom, examining the shower fixtures, towel rack, and illuminated mirror

entered.detail: wall-mounted rack holding red and white towels
floor-to-ceiling glass shower with metallic fixtures
warm LED light strip running vertically along the wall
black metallic panel with knobs and digital display
illuminated rectangular sink basin with glowing edges

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a compact, high-end bathroom with marble walls and warm artificial lighting. The camera explores the space, showing a glass shower enclosure, towel rack, and an illuminated sink, establishing the luxurious cyberpunk aesthetic.

events.description: opening the bathroom door and beginning to exit into the main apartment living area

agents.ego_description: approaching the bathroom door, grasping the handle, and opening it to reveal the main living space beyond

entered.detail: dark wooden sliding door with metallic handle
polished wooden floor visible through the opening door

segments.scene_description: The camera moves toward the bathroom exit, focusing on the door before opening it. As the door slides open, the wooden flooring and neon-lit bar area of the main apartment become visible, marking the transition from the enclosed bathroom to the open living space.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plan living room with bar and lounge areas

agents.ego_description: walking through the spacious main living area, passing the bar counter and approaching the lounge section

entered.detail: long counter with glowing cyan neon underlighting and glass facade
sculptural lion figure on a dark rectangular pedestal
low-profile contemporary seating in the lounge area
illuminated vertical light installation on the far wall
geometric black and gold patterned rug on the floor

segments.scene_description: Having exited the bathroom, the camera moves through a spacious, dimly lit living area featuring a neon-accented bar, modern lounge furniture, and a prominent lion statue. The space transitions from wooden flooring to patterned carpet as it approaches a hallway leading to the office.

events.description: entering the office room from the main living area hallway

agents.ego_description: walking into the dimly lit office and approaching the desk with dual monitors and shelving

entered.detail: large dark desk with illuminated edges and multiple monitors
dual screens displaying data and a monochrome image
tall shelving units filled with books and objects
ergonomic chair positioned at the desk
large screen displaying monochrome artwork on the wall

segments.scene_description: The final segment enters a private office space with low ambient lighting. The camera approaches a large desk setup with dual monitors, flanked by floor-to-ceiling bookshelves. The room features carpeted flooring and a wall-mounted display, creating an intimate workspace atmosphere distinct from the open living area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a compact, warmly lit bathroom into the expansive, neon-accented interior of a futuristic luxury apartment. It begins by exploring the marble walls and glass shower of the bathroom before gliding toward the exit. As the door slides open, the enclosed space gives way to a spacious living area where wooden flooring meets a neon-lit bar and modern lounge furniture. The camera then moves past a prominent lion statue, transitioning from wood to patterned carpet as it enters a hallway. Finally, the scene shifts into a dimly lit private office, approaching a large dual-monitor desk flanked by floor-to-ceiling bookshelves.
